mapper.select: SELECT grp_id, grp_nm, grp_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tc_com_cd_group WHERE NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY grp_id

SELECT grp_id, cd, cd_nm, cd_desc, cd_ord, cd_attr_1, cd_attr_2, cd_attr_3, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tc_com_cd_dtl WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt ORDER BY cd_ord, cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tc_com_cd_group (grp_id, grp_nm, grp_desc, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{grpId}, #{grpNm}, #{grpDesc}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tc_com_cd_group SET grp_nm = #{grpNm}, grp_desc = #{grpDesc}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tc_com_cd_dtl (grp_id, cd, cd_nm, cd_desc, cd_ord, cd_attr_1, cd_attr_2, cd_attr_3, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{grpId}, #{cd}, #{cdNm}, #{cdDesc}, #{cdOrd}, #{cdAttr1}, #{cdAttr2}, #{cdAttr3}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tc_com_cd_dtl SET cd_nm = #{cdNm}, cd_desc = #{cdDesc}, cd_ord = #{cdOrd}, cd_attr_1 = #{cdAttr1}, cd_attr_2 = #{cdAttr2}, cd_attr_3 = #{cdAttr3}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE grp_id = #{grpId} AND cd = #{cd} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
